title: Front Office Manager - Yatra Hotels - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Yatra Hotels - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Yatra Hotels in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Yatra Hotels:
Yatra Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
